summary.lv: Infrastruktūras arhitekta (ar praktisku DevOps) amats IT Camp fintech partneruzņēmumā, vadot IT infrastruktūras modernizāciju un automatizāciju vairākos mākoņos (AWS, Azure, GCP) ar Infrastructure-as-Code, virtualizāciju un monitoringu.
summary.en: An Infrastructure Architect (hands-on DevOps) role at an IT Camp fintech partner leading modernization and automation of IT infrastructure across AWS, Azure and GCP with Infrastructure-as-Code, virtualization and monitoring.
